column1: A recent study claims that drinking hot water mixed with baking soda can completely cure cancer within weeks. Doctors worldwide are allegedly hiding this “cheap cure” to protect pharmaceutical profits. Experts urge people to stop chemotherapy and switch immediately to this natural remedy.

A leaked report reveals that all smartphones manufactured after 2022 contain hidden government surveillance chips that record conversations even when the phone is turned off. Tech companies have secretly agreed to this policy under pressure from global authorities.
The government has announced that starting next year
column2: all college degrees will be automatically granted based on social media activity instead of exams. Students with higher engagement and followers will receive better grades.

column1: Scientists confirm that climate change has been completely reversed due to a sudden shift in Earth’s magnetic field. Global temperatures are expected to drop rapidly

A viral report claims that all bank savings will be automatically doubled by the government next month as part of a “wealth redistribution program.” Citizens are encouraged to deposit as much money as possible before the deadline.
